name: fontuccine-tangent-stretch
title: Tangent Stretch Text
author: Fontuccine contributors
description: Remaps caller-provided font outlines along glyph tangents in response to a configured interaction signal.

changes: Added the client-module boundary, removed explicit `.ts` import suffixes, and reused a stable empty configuration across renders.
Removed explicit `.ts` suffixes from relative imports for consumer TypeScript compatibility.

license.scope: src/react/index.ts and its exact copied runtime import closure at commit 1261bd116c7915a617ed21c85adab10bba6ca1a7

modifications.change: Added the client-module boundary, removed explicit `.ts` import suffixes, and reused a stable empty configuration across renders.
modifications.reason: Make the copied hook-based export safe in React server-component projects and avoid needless detach/attach cycles.

modifications.change: Removed explicit `.ts` suffixes from relative imports for consumer TypeScript compatibility.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied closure installable under standard strict TypeScript settings.

modifications.change: Removed explicit `.ts` suffixes, kept RTL output as untouched native text, and fell through to SVG when WebGL backend construction failed.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied closure installable under strict TypeScript, preserve complex-script shaping, and prevent a failed GPU context from leaving text transparent.

modifications.change: Added document visibility to the viewport gate and removed its listener during cleanup.
modifications.reason: Pause the engine while its document is hidden and remove every lifecycle listener.

modifications.change: Removed explicit `.ts` import suffixes and made touch and pen hover input intentionally static.
modifications.reason: Provide an intentional static result for touch, pen, and no-hover input without adding a second interaction model.

modifications.change: Removed explicit `.ts` import suffixes and made touch and pen proximity input intentionally static.
modifications.reason: Provide an intentional static result for touch, pen, and no-hover input without adding a second interaction model.

modifications.change: Stopped the shared ticker whenever no controller owns activity, including while gated render phases remain mounted.
modifications.reason: Prevent offscreen SVG and variable-font render subscriptions from sustaining an idle animation loop.
